title: Agent-Swarm Ownership Hierarchy with Conflict Detection

phases.title: SpacetimeDB schema: add owner_agent_id + task CAS fields
tasks: Add owner_agent_id: String to Swarm struct
Add version: u64 and claimed_by: String to SwarmTask struct
Update swarm_init reducer: read agent from hex_agent table, reject if agent.swarm_id non-empty and referenced swarm is active, set owner_agent_id = calling agent, update agent.swarm_id
Update task_assign reducer: add expected_version param, implement CAS (check version matches, status is pending, then assign atomically, increment version, set claimed_by)
Add swarm_transfer reducer: validates caller is owner, updates owner_agent_id + agent swarm_id links on both old and new owner
Keep created_by field (alias) for backward compat during migration

phases.title: State port trait: update interfaces for CAS and ownership
tasks: Update SwarmInfo struct: add owner_agent_id field
Update SwarmTaskInfo struct: add version: u64 and claimed_by fields
Update swarm_task_assign signature: add expected_version: Option<u64> param
Add ConflictError variants to StateError: VersionMismatch { expected, actual }, AlreadyClaimed { by: String }
Add swarm_transfer method to IStatePort trait
Add agent_owned_swarm(agent_id) method returning Option<SwarmInfo>

phases.title: SQLite fallback adapter: implement CAS + ownership
tasks: Add migration: ALTER TABLE swarms ADD COLUMN owner_agent_id TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''
Add migration: ALTER TABLE swarm_tasks ADD COLUMN version INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
Add migration: ALTER TABLE swarm_tasks ADD COLUMN claimed_by TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''
Backfill: UPDATE swarms SET owner_agent_id = created_by WHERE owner_agent_id = ''
Implement CAS in swarm_task_assign: SELECT version FOR UPDATE, compare, reject on mismatch, increment on success
Implement swarm_transfer: UPDATE swarms + UPDATE hex_agents for both old/new owner
Implement agent_owned_swarm: SELECT swarm by owner_agent_id WHERE status='active'

phases.title: SpacetimeDB state adapter: sync new fields
tasks: Update swarm deserialization to include owner_agent_id
Update task deserialization to include version + claimed_by
Pass expected_version to task_assign reducer call
Map ConflictError from reducer error strings
Add swarm_transfer delegation to reducer
Add agent_owned_swarm query via swarm table filter

phases.title: REST routes: enforce ownership + return CAS conflict
tasks: POST /api/swarms: read x-hex-agent-id header, call agent_owned_swarm, return 409 if already has active swarm
PATCH /api/swarms/tasks/:id (assign): read version from body, pass to state adapter, return 409 with conflict detail on CAS failure
GET /api/agents/:id/swarm: new route returning agent's owned swarm
POST /api/swarms/:id/transfer: new route delegating to swarm_transfer

phases.title: MCP tool schema: expose version + conflict fields
tasks: hex_hexflo_task_assign: add optional expected_version param to schema
hex_hexflo_task_assign: include version and claimed_by in response schema
hex_hexflo_swarm_init: document that it rejects if agent already owns active swarm
Add hex_hexflo_swarm_transfer tool: swarm_id + new_owner_agent_id
CLI: hex swarm transfer <swarm-id> <new-agent-id> command

phases.title: Validation: smoke test ownership + conflict scenarios
tasks: Verify agent can't init second swarm while first is active (409 returned)
Verify two agents racing on same task: first wins, second gets ConflictError
Verify swarm_transfer correctly moves ownership: old agent loses swarm_id, new agent gains it
Verify GET /api/agents/:id/swarm returns correct owned swarm
Verify backward compat: existing swarms without owner_agent_id get backfilled from created_by
